global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a streamlined body and predominantly white plumage. It features a gray back and wings, a yellow bill with a black ring near the tip, and pinkish legs. The head is rounded with a short neck, and the wings are long and pointed.

part_details.bill: Yellow with a distinct black ring near the tip, slightly hooked.
part_details.wings: Long, narrow, and pointed, gray with white tips.
part_details.legs: Short, pinkish, and webbed for swimming.
part_details.head: Rounded, white with a short neck.
part_details.body: Streamlined, predominantly white with a gray back.

spatial_relations: The gray wings extend from the sides of the white body.
The yellow bill protrudes from the front of the white head.
The pinkish legs are positioned under the body.
